productDisplayName: U.S. Polo Assn. Men Brown Sandals
description: A sartorial move of boldness, the sandal boot for men is for the cosmopolitan male who pushes the envelope with regard to his personal style. With the breathability of a sandal but style of a boot, these rakish sandals from U.S. Polo Association are designed for fashion leaders, not fashion followers. Upper Leather thong style upper Ankle strap joined with the thong straps A zipper on the lateral side of the ankle strap for a good Fit Tor separator Soft footbed Outsole TPR outsole with an upraised heel Patterned lugs all over for grip on various surfaces with suction points Sandal care Wipe with a clean dry cloth to remove dust Use a leather conditioner and a brush for added shine
